word: H3810 - לֹא דְבַר - Lôʼ Dᵉbar - lo deb-ar' - Debir

sections.paragraph:
Original: לדבר לדבר לו דבר לא דבר

Transliteration: lô' debar lô debar lidbir lôdebar

Phonetic: lo deb-ar'

BDB Definition:

Lo-debar = "not a pasture"
  1. a town in Manasseh in Gilead east of the Jordan

Origin: from H3808 and H1699

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
